zh.Mapledurham, Hampshire, England: 英國哈普爾馬普萊度哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Roger Copley於1473年出生在英國素瑞加頓時，他的父親Roger Copley11470歲，母親Anne Hoo the younger28歲。他於大約1502年與Jane Lode在英國素瑞加頓結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他去世於1560年在英國素可享年87歲。

zh-hans.Mapledurham, Hampshire, England: 英国哈普爾馬普萊度哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Roger Copley于1473年出生在英国素瑞加頓时，他的父亲Roger Copley11470岁，母亲Anne Hoo the younger28岁。他于大约1502年与Jane Lode在英国素瑞加頓结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他去世于1560年在英国素可享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: Copley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from any of various places called Copley, for example in County Durham, Staffordshire, and Yorkshire, from the Old English personal name Coppa (apparently a byname for a tall man) or from copp ‘hilltop’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Roger Copley was born in 1473, in Gatton, Surrey, England, his father, Roger Copley, was 11470 and his mother, Anne Hoo the younger, was 28. He married Jane Lode about 1502, in Gatton, Surrey, England. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He died in 1560, in Sussex, England, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Roger Copley est né en 1473, à Gatton, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Roger Copley, avait 11470 ans et sa mère, Anne Hoo the younger, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Jane Lode environ 1502, à Gatton, Surrey, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1560, à Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Roger Copley 1473 in Gatton, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Copley 11470 und seine Mutter Anne Hoo the younger 28. Er hat um 1502 in Gatton, Surrey, England Jane Lode geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb 1560 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Sussex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger Copley è nato il nel 1473 nel Gatton, Surrey, England, il suo padre, Roger Copley, aveva 11470 anni e il suo madre, Anne Hoo the younger, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Jane Lode circa 1502, nel Gatton, Surrey, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì nel 1560, nel Sussex, England, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Copleyが1473年にイギリススリーガットオンで生まれた時，父Roger Copleyは11470歳，母Anne Hoo the youngerは28歳であった。約1502年にイギリススリーガットオンでJane Lodeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1560年にイギリススセックスで87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Copley(이)가 1473년 영국 수리 가턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Copley(은)는 11470세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Hoo the younger(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1502년 영국 수리 가턴에서 Jane Lode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1560년 영국 수세스에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger Copley nasceu em 1473, em Gatton, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Copley, tinha 11470 anos e sua mãe, Anne Hoo the younger, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Lode aproximadamente 1502, em Gatton, Surrey, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1560, em Sussex, Inglaterra, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Roger Copley родился в 1473 г. в местности гаттон, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Copley было 11470 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Hoo the younger, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Lode около 1502 г. в местности гаттон, сурри, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он умер в 1560 г. в местности суссекс, Англия в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Roger Copley nació en 1473, en Gatton, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Copley, tenía 11470 años y su mamá, Anne Hoo the younger, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Jane Lode aproximadamente 1502, en Gatton, Surrey, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió en 1560, en Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 87 años.
